reason: Agent QA-20260425-012206-igu2 successfully received and responded to the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" with the correct answer "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including QA-20260425-012206-igu2.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260425-012206-igu2" in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened and displayed the agent's home screen.
Verified agent status — Status indicator showed "idle" at the top right of the agent detail page.
Clicked on the message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered into the input field.
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and the agent began processing (status changed to "working").
Waited for response — Response arrived within 2 seconds. The agent displayed "4" as the answer with "Worked for 2s" metadata below.
Verified response mentions "4" — The agent's response clearly shows "4" as the correct answer to the math question "What is 2+2?", displayed prominently in the chat interface.
